trades.reasoning: Top-scoring candidate (95) with RSI 62.1 in the bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, and price above SMA-20, deploying idle cash above the $500 threshold into an open slot.

decisions.briefing: Markets were neutral today with NASDAQ +1.0% and S&P 500 +0.4% — not a strong risk-on signal, but with $777 in cash and 4 open slots we deployed a modest medium-conviction position in BLSH, the top-scoring candidate, rather than let cash sit idle. All six existing positions were held unchanged as none showed reason to exit.

market_education.summary_en: Broad markets drifted modestly higher today, with the NASDAQ outpacing the S&P 500, consistent with a mild risk-on tilt toward growth and tech names rather than a broad-based rally. No major macro catalyst stood out, suggesting the move was driven by incremental buying rather than a single news event. Trading stayed within a normal range, reflecting a market in a holding pattern rather than a decisive trend.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤溫和上揚,納指升幅跑贏標普500指數,反映市場資金略為傾向科技及成長股,而非全面普漲。今日未見重大宏觀消息帶動,顯示今次升勢較多屬於資金持續小幅買入所致,而非單一新聞事件觸發。整體波動維持在正常區間,顯示市場仍處於觀望格局,未見明確方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the opportunity cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio instead of putting it to work — even a small, well-chosen position can outperform sitting in cash over time. Today, with cash above the reserve threshold and open slots available, deploying a portion into a strong candidate helps avoid missing out on further gains while still keeping most positions untouched.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」(Cash Drag)是指組合持有太多未投資現金所產生的機會成本——即使只是小額但選股得宜的倉位,長遠回報也可能跑贏現金。今日現金水平已超過保留門檻且尚有空置倉位,故將部分資金投入表現強勁的candidate,既可避免錯失潛在升幅,亦維持大部分現有持倉不變。
